items.title: 'Boeing plans to open fourth 737 production line in mid-summer'- Reuters
Jim Cramer on TAT Technologies (TATT): “I Think That That Is Exactly Where To Be”
items.description: TAT Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ:TATT) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer looked at recently. Noting the presence of an “aging global fleet of aircraft and the backlog of Boeing,” a caller mentioned that the company is benefiting from it. Cramer commented: Yeah, that is a really interesting stock. I know it’s moved up a lot, […]

items.title: VergeIO Records Strong Growth as Private Cloud Operating System Strategy Accelerates
items.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich., February 10, 2026--VergeIO, the VMware alternative redefining infrastructure as a Private Cloud Operating System, recorded its strongest year to date with annual recurring revenue growing more than 80% year over year. The company exceeded its 2025 ARR plan by more than 25%, driven by increased enterprise adoption of VergeOS and a growing shift away from traditional virtualization toward cloud-style operations on customer-controlled infrastructure.

items.title: Non-Destructive Testing Equipment Market to Reach US$ 5,639.70 Million by 2033 Driven by Infrastructure Safety Mandates and Predictive Maintenance Adoption | Astute Analytica
items.description: Driven by rising manufacturing output, stringent regulations, and critical infrastructure safety requirements across aerospace, oil and gas, and defense sectors. Integration of predictive maintenance is creating long-term growth opportunities, with NDT data being crucial for monitoring pipeline wall thickness, corrosion in storage tanks, and weld integrity in pressure vessels.Chicago, Feb. 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The global non-destructive testing equipment market was valued at 2,961.35 mil
